description: Control fixture: a v3 package-lock.json with mainstream npm packages chosen to clear all four scanner passes. semver / minimatch / acorn / ajv are each absent from vulnerabilities/supply-chain/typosquat-db/known_typosquats.json's npm target list (express/react/lodash were avoided because they ARE typosquat targets and would trip the canonical-target self-match scanner FP), absent from the npm OSV cache, and short enough that they do not substring-match any entry in vulnerabilities/cve/code-relevant/cve_patterns.json (glob was avoided because it is a prefix of `globalprotect` in CVE-2024-3400). scan_dependencies must return zero findings on this fixture.
